---
title: "[R is for <br>Authoring!!]{.shadowsharp}" 
author: "OOH Session #135...<br>[FONT AWESOME<br>icons!!!]{.bravo  style='font-size:2em;' .shadowmax}&nbsp;[{{< fa thumbs-up >}}]{.Bigger}"
title-slide-attributes: 
  data-background-image: ../../../img/awesome.png
#  data-background-opacity: ".9"
format: 
  revealjs:
    mouse-wheel: true              
    slide-tone: false
    transition: convex
    transition-speed: slow
    code-overflow: wrap              ## has never "worked"
    theme: ../../../css/theming2026.scss 
    logo: https://cdn.freebiesupply.com/logos/thumbs/2x/johnny-bravo-1-logo.png #https://www.pngplay.com/wp-content/uploads/14/Pink-Panther-Thinking-Transparent-Images.png
    footer-logo-link: "https://github.com/jtkulas/LiveStreams"  ## https://github.com/shafayetShafee/reveal-header#readme
    preview-links: false      ## true brings up iframe window instead of "site"
    code-annotations: hover   ## select
engine: knitr                 ## not picking up inline codes
custom-callout:
  eighteen: 
    title: "Adults Only!"
    icon-symbol: "🔞"
    color: "red"
filters: 
  - reveal-header
  - custom-callout
  - callout-png
execute: 
  eval: false       ## for fenced code 
  echo: true
---

## Open Office Hours <br>(`r format(Sys.Date(),"%B %d, %Y")`) 

::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="55%"}
+ Recap session #134
+ Today's topic(s):
    + [[FONT AWESOME<br>icons!!]{.bravo style='font-size:1.5em;'}&nbsp;[{{< fa champagne-glasses >}}]{.bigger}](https://quarto-ext.github.io/fontawesome/)
+ Shared problem-solving


:::

::: {.column width="45%"}

<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>

::: {.callout-note}
## Reminder -- check it out!! {{< iconify emojione-v1:blue-book >}}{{< iconify emojione-v1:green-book >}}
Fantastic [{{< iconify material-icon-theme:quarto >}} resource!! ](https://qmd4sci.njtierney.com/) 
:::

:::

:::

::: {.absolute style="top: 170px; right: -120px; width:550px;"}
<a href="https://jtkulas.github.io/LiveStreams/slides/2026/6_16_26">
  <img src="/img/title134.JPG">
</a>
:::

![](https://static.vecteezy.com/system/resources/previews/015/241/249/non_2x/glowing-neon-arrow-doodle-transparent-free-png.png){.absolute top="165" left="385" width="200"}

# Recap of Session <br>#134: 

![](https://pngimg.com/uploads/sticky_note/sticky_note_PNG18952.png){.absolute right="100"}

![](https://cdn.creazilla.com/cliparts/1996313/cheer-megaphone-clipart-md.png){.absolute top="305" right="118" height="150"}

## [[Custom Callouts!!]{.calling .bigger}](https://github.com/coatless-quarto/custom-callout)

::: {.panel-tabset}

### icons {{< iconify line-md:iconify2 >}}

::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="70%"}

[`custom-callout` ({{< iconify octicon:lockup-github-16 style="color:#ffffff;" >}}) ](https://github.com/coatless-quarto/custom-callout):  

```{bash}
---
custom-callout:
  eighteen: 
    title: "Adults Only!"
    icon-symbol: "🔞"
    color: "red"
---

::: {.eighteen}
![](https://encrypted-tbn0.gstatic.com/images?q=tbn:ANd9GcRe36NJlNE_FLPrdqKEcn-n6w1z1xCWSnDkKi5c1cByBK403DmVC7IeFew&s=10)
:::

```

:::

::: {.column width="30%"}

::: {.eighteen}
![](https://encrypted-tbn0.gstatic.com/images?q=tbn:ANd9GcRe36NJlNE_FLPrdqKEcn-n6w1z1xCWSnDkKi5c1cByBK403DmVC7IeFew&s=10)
:::

:::

:::

### images {{< iconify twemoji:framed-picture >}}

::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="60%"}

[`callout-png` ({{< iconify octicon:lockup-github-16 style="color:#ffffff;" >}}) ](https://github.com/jtkulas/callout-png): 

```{bash}

::: {.callout-png title="Adults Only!"image="https://png.pngtree.com/png-vector/20220723/ourmid/pngtree-18-icon-png-png-image_6034772.png" color="#a02f2c" image-height="1.2em" header-vpad=".5em"}  

![](https://media1.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExajdheGkxcWYzOXZrNGhzbmxqczRkaWxqa3l0YTFrY2RwcDZxeDloOSZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/Gns1lc03zB3sw8oXvD/giphy.gif)

:::
  
```

extension version of [older spec](https://jtkulas.github.io/LiveStreams/slides/bookdown/callouts/#/customized-callouts)

:::

::: {.column width="40%"}

::: {.callout-png title="Adults Only!"image="https://png.pngtree.com/png-vector/20220723/ourmid/pngtree-18-icon-png-png-image_6034772.png" color="#a02f2c" image-height="1.2em" header-vpad=".5em"}  

![](https://media1.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExajdheGkxcWYzOXZrNGhzbmxqczRkaWxqa3l0YTFrY2RwcDZxeDloOSZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/Gns1lc03zB3sw8oXvD/giphy.gif)

:::

:::

:::

### Comparison {{< iconify noto:thinking-face >}}

::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="55%" .Smaller}

### `custom-callout` 

+ icons, unicode & strings
+ mimics native Quarto [appearance(s)](https://quarto.org/docs/authoring/callouts.html#appearance)
  + color on border (banner washed)
  + collapsable
+ &#x2705; html &#x2705; revealjs <br> &#x274C; typst &#x274C; pdf

:::

::: {.column width="45%" .smaller}

### `callout-png`

+ all image types
  + including icons\*
+ relative image/title positioning
+ &#x2705; html &#x2705; revealjs <br> &#x2705; typst &#x2705; pdf

:::



:::

:::

![](https://media1.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExNDZ6MGU1dWIxYTh0OGd4N2F6OGMweTQ1OHA1bnpoY2xtZjFxa2JxYSZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/Vl5WoEWS5G21oFFdo2/giphy.gif){.absolute right="-140" top="-40" height="270"}

# Today...

![](https://media4.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExNnZsdzhydnlkeThpNWhzaHkzeTZ3eG14bnVmdGRkNDVnbjRmZXRzeiZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/WyyhtSnaQl8Eo/giphy.gif)

## [[[FONT AWESOME icons!!]{.bravo}&nbsp;{{< fa heart >}}]{.bigger}](https://quarto-ext.github.io/fontawesome/)

::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="50%"}

[[{{< iconify material-icon-theme:quarto >}} Extension:](https://quarto-ext.github.io/fontawesome/)]{.Bigger}

![](https://media1.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExeHVkbmp2d2RpNGtqeG5mNXh5bTNxeDRocjdjbG92aDg0ajJmOTQ5cyZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/mvW2WgHHi6vOo/giphy.gif)

:::

::: {.column width="50%"}

[[{{< iconify devicon:r >}} Package:](https://cran.r-project.org/web/packages/fontawesome/fontawesome.pdf)]{.Bigger}

&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;`r fontawesome::fa("r-project", fill="#FFFFFF", height="5em")`

&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;`r fontawesome::fa("yin-yang", fill="#000000", height="5em")` 

:::

::: {.column width="33%"}

:::

:::

## {{< iconify devicon:r size=2x style="color:#82b1ff;" >}} & {{< iconify material-icon-theme:quarto size=2x >}} Session Info (`r format(Sys.Date(),"%B %d, %Y")`) Rendering: 

::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="80%"}
```{r}
#| echo: false
#| eval: true
sessionInfo()
```
:::

::: {.column width="20%"}

Quarto version `r quarto::quarto_version()`  

:::

:::
